title: Cap real external integration repair with focused proof
action: Adopt and verify the already-implemented focused repair from superseded cell 3. Preserve real git ls-files, Git, Bash, installed Node hook, and Codex invocations. Keep Node-only wrappers on the shared Worker runner. External commands pass only on concrete status/output; the Bash installed-route fixture may bind stdin/stdout/stderr through temporary file descriptors to keep the real Bash-to-installed-Node boundary observable under the sandbox. Do not split, skip, mock, or emulate any acceptance row.

truths: Portable paths reports the real tracked-path count from git ls-files.
Hook contracts execute all 141 rows with zero failures.
Real Git, Bash, installed Node hook, and Codex binaries remain invoked.
Nonzero/null status or missing required output still fails.

artifacts.substantive: shared Worker wrappers and observable real external routes

key_links: hook contracts import the shared runner from cell 2
installed-route Bash streams are observed without replacing the Bash-to-installed-command invocation
prohibitions: No filesystem-walk substitute for git ls-files
No external acceptance split, skip, mock, or emulation

verify: node scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && git diff --check

trace.outcome: Adopted and proved the existing external-integration repair: real Git/Bash/Codex routes remain real, Node-only wrappers use the shared Worker runner, and acceptance stays status/output-driven.
trace.friction: stale or contradictory doc: docs/history/codex-sandbox-baseline/CONTEXT.md is absent; the approved plan and decision a83a3613 supplied the locked scope.

    "hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs: Node-only wrappers use the shared Worker runner while real Git/Bash/Codex routes retain concrete status/output grading"
  ],
  "red_failure_evidence": "Before the recovered repair, scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs used execFileSync for real git ls-files and aborted on the sandbox EPERM; hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs treated external result.error as an unconditional failure and its Node-only wrappers still used forbidden nested spawnSync. The superseded cell-3 report records the scoped repair as green before its out-of-scope full-baseline blocker.",
  "verification_run": "node scripts/test_portable_paths.mjs && node hooks/test_hook_contracts.mjs && git diff --check -> exit 0; portable paths reported 913 real tracked paths, hook contracts reported 141 rows across 16 groups with 0 skipped and 0 failing, ALL PASS, and diff check was clean.",
  "deliberate_exceptions": []
}
